sprite

rewrite.hpp

Go to the documentation of this file.
00001 
00005 #pragma once
00006 #include "sprite/node.hpp"
00007 
00008 namespace sprite
00009 {
00015   template<> struct rewrite<OPER>
00016   {
00017     rewrite() {}
00018     #define F(z,n,_)                                             \
00019         void operator()(                                         \
00020             Node & node, size_t id                               \
00021             BOOST_PP_ENUM_TRAILING_PARAMS(n,NodePtr const & arg) \
00022           ) const                                                \
00023         {                                                        \
00024           node.destroy_payload();                                \
00025           new(node._payload()) payloads::InPlace<n>(             \
00026               BOOST_PP_ENUM_PARAMS(n,arg)                        \
00027             );                                                   \
00028           node.m_arity = n;                                      \
00029           node.m_id = id;                                        \
00030           node.m_tag = OPER;                                     \
00031         }                                                        \
00032         
00033     BOOST_PP_REPEAT(SPRITE_INPLACE_BOUND,F,)
00034     #undef F
00035 
00040     void operator()(
00041         Node & node, size_t id, size_t arity, NodePtr * args
00042       ) const
00043     {
00044       node.destroy_payload();
00045       new(node._payload()) payloads::ChildList(args, arity);
00046       node.m_arity = arity;
00047       node.m_id = id;
00048       node.m_tag = OPER;
00049     }
00050   };
00051 
00060   template<> struct rewrite<CTOR>
00061   {
00062     rewrite() {}
00063     #define F(z,n,_)                                             \
00064         template<typename Enum>                                  \
00065         void operator()(                                         \
00066             Node & node, Enum tag, size_t id                     \
00067             BOOST_PP_ENUM_TRAILING_PARAMS(n,NodePtr const & arg) \
00068           ) const                                                \
00069         {                                                        \
00070           node.destroy_payload();                                \
00071           new(node._payload()) payloads::InPlace<n>(             \
00072               BOOST_PP_ENUM_PARAMS(n,arg)                        \
00073             );                                                   \
00074           node.m_arity = n;                                      \
00075           assert((int)tag >= (int)CTOR);                         \
00076           node.m_tag = make_ctor_tag(tag);                       \
00077           node.m_id  = id;                                       \
00078         }                                                        \
00079         
00080     BOOST_PP_REPEAT(SPRITE_INPLACE_BOUND,F,)
00081     #undef F
00082 
00087     template<typename Enum>
00088     void operator()(
00089         Node & node, Enum tag, size_t id, size_t arity, NodePtr * args
00090       ) const
00091     {
00092       node.destroy_payload();
00093       new(node._payload()) payloads::ChildList(args, arity);
00094       node.m_arity = arity;
00095       assert((int)tag >= (int)CTOR);
00096       node.m_tag = make_ctor_tag(tag);
00097       node.m_id = id;
00098     }
00099   };
00100 
00102   template<> struct rewrite<FAIL>
00103   {
00104     rewrite() {}
00105     void operator()(Node & node) const
00106     {
00107       node.destroy_payload();
00108       node.m_tag = FAIL;
00109     }
00110   };
00111 
00113   template<> struct rewrite<CHOICE>
00114   {
00115     rewrite() {}
00116     void operator()(
00117         Node & node, size_t id, NodePtr const & lhs, NodePtr const & rhs
00118       ) const
00119     {
00120       node.destroy_payload();
00121       new(node._payload()) payloads::Choice(lhs,rhs);
00122       node.m_id = id;
00123       node.m_tag = CHOICE;
00124     }
00125   };
00126 
00128   template<> struct rewrite<FWD>
00129   {
00130     rewrite() {}
00131     void operator()(Node & node, NodePtr const & dest) const
00132     {
00133       node.destroy_payload();
00134       new(node._payload()) payloads::Fwd(dest);
00135       node.m_tag = FWD;
00136     }
00137   };
00138 
00140   template<> struct rewrite<INT>
00141   {
00142     rewrite() {}
00143     void operator()(Node & node, meta::ValueType<INT>::type value) const
00144     {
00145       node.destroy_payload();
00146       new(node._payload()) payloads::Int(value);
00147       node.m_tag = INT;
00148     }
00149   };
00150 
00152   template<> struct rewrite<FLOAT>
00153   {
00154     rewrite() {}
00155     void operator()(Node & node, meta::ValueType<FLOAT>::type value) const
00156     {
00157       node.destroy_payload();
00158       new(node._payload()) payloads::Float(value);
00159       node.m_tag = FLOAT;
00160     }
00161   };
00162 
00163   // A minor convenience, perhaps.  These aliases prevent having to construct
00164   // an instance of rewrite<Tag> to perform a rewrite step when Tag is not a
00165   // variable (i.e., a template parameter).
00166 
00168   rewrite<CTOR> const rewrite_ctor = rewrite<CTOR>();
00169 
00171   rewrite<OPER> const rewrite_oper = rewrite<OPER>();
00172 
00174   rewrite<FAIL> const rewrite_fail = rewrite<FAIL>();
00175 
00177   rewrite<CHOICE> const rewrite_choice = rewrite<CHOICE>();
00178 
00180   rewrite<FWD> const rewrite_fwd = rewrite<FWD>();
00181 
00183   rewrite<INT> const rewrite_int = rewrite<INT>();
00184 
00186   rewrite<FLOAT> const rewrite_float = rewrite<FLOAT>();
00187 }
